queue_entry.title: Re-optimize ASX with SMA-200, IBS, RSI period features
queue_entry.hypothesis: The SMA-200 filter, IBS confirmation, and configurable RSI period were added during SP500 optimization but never tested on ASX. These features may improve ASX performance, particularly: SMA-200 filtering out downtrend entries, IBS improving mean reversion entry quality, and RSI period tuning finding a better signal frequency for the smaller ASX universe.

acceptance_criteria.description: Sharpe improvement >= 0.05 OR DD reduction >= 1pp without Sharpe degradation. Min 250 trades.

queue_entry.notes: SMA-200 was too aggressive on SP500 (reduced trades to insignificant levels). May behave differently on smaller ASX universe. IBS filter already proven on SP500 opening_gap — test on ASX mean_reversion.

config_snapshot.description: Phase 8B: Universe 159, 8C: Sector rotation (min_conf=0.80), 8D: Dynamic position sizing. Phase 9 cointegration filter tested but disabled (net negative impact).

trailing_stop._note: Tested 2026-02-18: HURTS full-universe performance. Best on top-25 large-caps only. See backtest/results/trailing_stop_validation.json

live_safety._note: To enable live: set broker=moomoo, live_enabled=true, dry_run_first=false. REQUIRES OpenD running.

moomoo._credentials: Managed via ~/.atlas-secrets.json or env vars. Run: atlas setup-secrets

fees._fee_notes: Moomoo AU: Commission 0.01% (min $1/order) + Platform Fee 0.02% (min $2/order) = 0.03% total (min $3/order). GST inclusive. All Atlas positions under $10K so effectively $3 flat per trade.
fees._actual_fee_analysis_2026_02_26: Real data from 7 filled orders (90 days): avg $1.36/order (AU: $3.00 flat incl GST, US: avg $1.11 platform + $0.11 settlement + $0.03 activity). Config $3.00 is conservative by 54.6% — keeps backtest pessimistic which is preferred.

dynamic_sizing.description: Scales position size based on signal confidence and volatility regime

confidence_scaling.description: Linear scale: conf 0.75->0.3% risk, conf 0.95->0.8% risk

volatility_scaling.description: Adjusts size based on stock volatility relative to price

fee_aware_filter._comment: Filter signals where expected net PnL (after round-trip commission) < min_expected_pnl. RRR=1.4 matches observed avg_winner/avg_loser ratio. min_expected_pnl=6.0 = round-trip commission ($3 in + $3 out).
fee_aware_filter._finding: Phase 3 test (2026-02-20): Filter removed 34/199 trades (17%) but reduced CAGR 8.34%->7.63% and Sharpe 0.522->0.452. PF improved slightly (1.639->1.678). Removed trades had avg net contribution $2.24 (below $4.36 avg but still positive). Filter not net beneficial for this system: existing quality filters (RS, breadth, min_confidence) already screen marginal signals. Disabled. Alternative: raise min_position_value to reduce commission-drag percentage.

regime_filter._comment: 3-state regime: Bull (IOZ>50MA & breadth>50%)=1.0x, Neutral=0.75x, Bear (IOZ<50MA & breadth<40%)=0.5x position scale
regime_filter._finding: Phase 3 test (2026-02-20): Filter removed 91/199 trades (46%). CAGR 8.34%->3.15%, Sharpe 0.522->-0.071. Over-restrictive: ASX spends majority of time in NEUTRAL regime (mixed signals). 0.75x neutral scale causes marginal trades to fail min_position_value. Bear regime = 0 trades (0.5x always below $500 min). Best trades occur in neutral/mixed markets - removing them is harmful. Disabled. Regime injected as INFO features in signals for future ML use (Phase 5).
